zh.lifeSummary: 當Alice D. Eyncourt於1318年出生在英國林可爾史爾布藍可尼時，她的父親Roger  IV Deincourt Lord of Knapthorpe25歲，母親Matilda Bugge23歲。她於1346年9月29日與Nicholas de Longford II在英國英格蘭德比夏爾德比結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1385年之後在英國藍卡爾帕克 霍爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alice D. Eyncourt于1318年出生在英国林可爾史爾布藍可尼时，她的父亲Roger  IV Deincourt Lord of Knapthorpe25岁，母亲Matilda Bugge23岁。她于1346年9月29日与Nicholas de Longford II在英国英格兰德比夏爾德比结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1385年之后在英国藍卡爾帕克 霍爾。

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Alice D. Eyncourt was born in 1318, in Blankney, Lincolnshire, England, her father, Roger  IV Deincourt Lord of Knapthorpe, was 25 and her mother, Matilda Bugge, was 23. She married Nicholas de Longford II on 29 September 1346, in Derby, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. She died after 1385, in Park Hall, Lancashire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alice D. Eyncourt est née en 1318, à Blankney, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, son père, Roger  IV Deincourt Lord of Knapthorpe, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Matilda Bugge, avait 23 ans. Elle a épousé Nicholas de Longford II le 29 septembre 1346, à Derby, Derbyshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée après 1385, à Park Hall, Lancashire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alice D. Eyncourt 1318 in Blankney, Lincolnshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Roger  IV Deincourt Lord of Knapthorpe 25 und ihre Mutter Matilda Bugge 23. Sie hat am 29. September 1346 in Derby, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom Nicholas de Longford II geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb nach 1385 in Park Hall, Lancashire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alice D. Eyncourt è nata il nel 1318 nel Blankney, Lincolnshire, England, sua padre, Roger  IV Deincourt Lord of Knapthorpe, aveva 25 anni e sua madre, Matilda Bugge, aveva 23 anni. Lei sposato Nicholas de Longford II il 29 settembre 1346, nel Derby, Derbyshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì dopo il 1385, nel Park Hall, Lancashire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Alice D. Eyncourtが1318年にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアブランクニーで生まれた時，父Roger  IV Deincourt Lord of Knapthorpeは25歳，母Matilda Buggeは23歳であった。1346年9月29日にイギリスイギリスデルブイシュアイアデルビーでNicholas de Longford IIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1385年以後にイギリスランカシュアイアパーク ハルで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Alice D. Eyncourt(이)가 1318년 영국 링코실르 블랭니에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Roger  IV Deincourt Lord of Knapthorpe(은)는 25세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Matilda Bugge(은)는 23세였다. 그녀는 1346년 9월 29일 영국 잉글랜드 더비실르 더비에서 Nicholas de Longford II(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1385년 이후 영국 랭카실르 박 홀에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alice D. Eyncourt nasceu em 1318, em Blankney, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Roger  IV Deincourt Lord of Knapthorpe, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Matilda Bugge, tinha 23 anos. Ela casou-se com Nicholas de Longford II em 29 de setembro de 1346, em Derby, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu após 1385, em Park Hall, Lancashire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alice D. Eyncourt родилась в 1318 г. в местности бланни, линколншир, Англия, её отцу по имени Roger  IV Deincourt Lord of Knapthorpe было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Matilda Bugge, 23. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Nicholas de Longford II 29 сентября 1346 г. в местности дирби, дирбишир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла после 1385 г. в местности парк холл, ланкашир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alice D. Eyncourt nació en 1318, en Blankney, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Roger  IV Deincourt Lord of Knapthorpe, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Matilda Bugge, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Nicholas de Longford II el 29 de septiembre de 1346, en Derby, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió después de 1385, en Park Hall, Lancashire, Inglaterra.
